name: Filibuster Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 Slices OSCAR MAYER Beef Cotto Salami
4 Slices KRAFT Natural Muenster or Swiss Cheese
recipeInstructions:
FOR each sandwich:
1. SPREAD 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) of horseradish sauce on a roll.
2. LAYER the bottom half of the roll with 1 slice each of salami, bologna, and cheese.
3. ADD 4 pickle slices, 1 tablespoon (Tbsp) of coleslaw, and 1 thin red onion slice on top.
4. PLACE the top half of the roll on the ingredients.
Makes 4 sandwiches.
